mapper.select: SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post cp WHERE cp.user_id = #{ownerId} AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND cp.is_anonymous = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_comment cc JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = cc.post_id AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' WHERE cc.user_id = #{ownerId} AND cc.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND cc.parent_id IS NOT NULLNULL
AND cc.is_anonymous = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction pr JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = pr.post_id AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' WHERE pr.user_id = #{ownerId} AND pr.reaction_type = 'BOOKMARK'
AND pr.is_anonymous = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_scrap ps WHERE ps.user_id = #{ownerId}
AND ps.is_anonymous = 0
